## Governance checks

- [ ] `REPO_PROFILE.json` remains current if paths or commands changed.
- [ ] `contracts/` changes include validation, tests, and docs updates.
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md`, `docs/roadmaps/ROADMAP.md`, or `docs/roadmaps/CURRENT_STATE_AND_NEXT.md` changed if phase routing changed.
- [ ] `DECISIONS.md` and relevant `docs/decisions/` daily files changed only for durable architecture decisions.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` includes concrete user-visible or repo-operational changes.
